subject: english
source_title: Third Term SS1 English Language Lesson Notes
learning_objectives: Identify incorrectly spelt forms from the source list
Apply the correct spellings in writing

sections.heading: Common Errors (Part 1)
sections.content: The note lists examples such as accomodations/accommodation, begining/beginning, clearify/clarify, continous/continuous, defiinate/definite, convenant/covenant, and dilligent/diligent.

sections.heading: Common Errors (Part 2)
sections.content: Other examples include auxillary/auxiliary, enimity/enmity, enviroment/environment, and greatful/grateful.
